title: The State of Food and Agriculture 2019. Moving forward on food loss and waste reduction, In brief
description: This is an in brief version of the 2019 edition of The State of Food and Agriculture, which focuses on food losses and waste, providing new estimates of the world’s food post-harvest up to, but excluding, the retail level.
author: Food and Agriculture Organization
attribution_md:
The State of Food and Agriculture 2019. Moving forward on food loss and waste reduction, In brief
This is an in brief version of the 2019 edition of The State of Food and Agriculture, which focuses on food losses and waste, providing new estimates of the world’s food post-harvest up to, but excluding, the retail level.

Image: Food and Agriculture Organization ([source](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:The_State_of_Food_and_Agriculture_2019._Moving_forward_on_food_loss_and_waste_reduction,_In_brief.pdf))
